summary: This document displays the interface of an "Agent Skills Marketplace" for the open SKILL.md ecosystem, showcasing 269,875 available open-source agent skills. It features AI-powered search, sorting options, and a trend graph illustrating skill growth over time. The marketplace is highlighted as a resource for community-built skills and is mentioned in the context of platforms like Anthropic and LangChain.
